name: Dilly Zucchini Ricotta Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line a muffin pan with paper liners or grease the cups.
3. Sift flour into a bowl and level off.
4. In a large bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and dill weed until well combined.
5. In a medium bowl, combine milk, melted margarine, and eggs. Stir in ricotta cheese and shredded zucchini until smooth.
6. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened (the batter will be stiff).
7. Fill prepared muffin cups about 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown, immediately remove from pan and serve.
